notes: Strict comparison covers local staging for shopPolicyUpdate, downstream shop.shopPolicies read-after-write, and the captured oversized-body ShopPolicyUserError branch. The local updatedAt is synthetic because supported mutations are not proxied upstream at runtime. HAR-636 adds expected differences for the legacy capture title/checkout-host values because the source-backed proxy now stages deprecated title casing and primary-domain URL fallback.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy stages supported mutations locally and emits a deterministic local timestamp instead of Shopify's live mutation timestamp.
Downstream reads expose the local staged policy timestamp after shopPolicyUpdate instead of Shopify's live mutation timestamp.
HAR-636 updates staged shopPolicyUpdate titles to Shopify source-backed deprecated title casing even when the legacy capture has the older Contact title.
HAR-636 uses the hydrated shop primary-domain fallback because Admin shop hydration does not expose shop.checkout_url; numeric policy path segments keep Shopify shape.
Downstream reads expose the locally staged HAR-636 title casing for the updated contact-information policy.
Downstream reads expose the locally staged HAR-636 primary-domain URL fallback for the updated contact-information policy.
